completed_tasks.name: Separate About and Contact Us routes
Upgrade the launcher typography and color system

remaining_tasks.name: Finish visual parity between public launcher and authenticated dashboard
Prepare deployment/release path for production hosting

blockers.description: Production deployment target and release process are not yet defined in-repo.
blockers.workaround: Continue implementing the web app locally until hosting/release details are provided.

human_actions_pending.action: Confirm the production deployment target and release workflow.
human_actions_pending.context: The app is implemented in the repo, but not deployed from here.

decisions.decision: Use the locked-preview launcher as the public homepage.
decisions.rationale: It preserves app-first clarity while keeping login explicit.

decisions.decision: Use an A/C hybrid palette rather than pure carbon or pure editorial copper.
decisions.rationale: It keeps the product calm and trustworthy while still giving the brand enough character.

decisions.decision: Use Fraunces for headings and Manrope for body text.
decisions.rationale: The previous font stack felt too generic and too close to the original prototype.

next_action: Continue with dashboard polish and Supabase-backed category visibility preferences, then define the deployment target.
context_notes: The work shifted from concept sketching into a live frontend implementation stream. The public shell, auth entry, and routing are in place; the main gap is finishing the authenticated dashboard to match the new visual system and adding persistence for visible/hidden categories.
